description: Claude Code Observability Dashboard - Monitor usage, costs, and performance

targets.expr: count( max_over_time(claude_code_session_count_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}) )

sum( (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}) )

sum( (max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}) )

sum( (max_over_time(claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}) )

sum by (model) ((max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__rate_interval]) - min_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}))

panels.description: Per-interval cost via windowed delta (max_over_time - min_over_time) instead of increase(), avoiding session-reset extrapolation spikes.
panels.title: Cost by Model (per interval)

targets.expr: sum by (type) (rate(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__rate_interval]) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}) * 60)

sum by (model) (changes(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__rate_interval]) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}))

sum( (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}) )

panels.description: Total spend over the dashboard range via windowed delta (max_over_time - min_over_time) summed across session series, host-joined. Avoids increase() extrapolation inflation.
panels.title: Total Spend (range)

targets.expr: sum( (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}) ) / ($__range_s / 3600)

panels.description: Total windowed-delta spend divided by range hours ($__range_s / 3600).
panels.title: Avg Cost / Hour

targets.expr: sum by (model) ((max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}))

panels.description: Total spend per model over the range (windowed delta, host-joined).
panels.title: Cost by Model

targets.expr: sum by (model) ((max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__rate_interval]) - min_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"})) / ($__rate_interval_s / 3600)

panels.description: Per-model hourly cost rate: windowed delta over $__rate_interval scaled to $/hr via $__rate_interval_s. Windowed delta avoids session-reset spikes from increase().
panels.title: Cost Rate ($/hr) by Model

targets.expr: count( max_over_time(claude_code_session_count_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}) )

panels.description: Distinct session series active within the dashboard range (count of host-joined session_count series seen over the window).
panels.title: Total Sessions (range)

targets.expr: count( max_over_time(claude_code_session_count_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}) ) / ($__range_s / 3600)

panels.description: Total distinct sessions divided by range hours ($__range_s / 3600).
panels.title: Avg Sessions / Hour

targets.expr: sum( (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}) ) / (count( max_over_time(claude_code_session_count_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}) ) or vector(0))

panels.description: Total windowed-delta spend divided by distinct sessions in range. Divide-by-zero guarded with 'or vector(0)'.
panels.title: Avg Cost / Session

targets.expr: count(last_over_time(claude_code_session_count_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__interval]) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}))

panels.description: Active session series per step via last_over_time over $__interval, host-joined.
panels.title: Sessions Over Time

targets.expr: topk(15, sum by (session_id) ((max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"})))

panels.title: Most Expensive Sessions
panels.description: Top 15 sessions by cost over range (deliberately NOT session_id-filtered — this is the picker). Click a session_id to filter.

targets.expr: sum by (tool_name) (count_over_time({service_name="claude-code", host_name=~"$host_name"} |= "claude_code.tool_result" | session_id=~"$session_id" [$__interval]))
sum by (tool_name) (count_over_time({service_name="claude-code", host_name=~"$host_name"} |= "claude_code.tool_result" | session_id=~"$session_id" [$__range]))

100 * (sum by (tool_name) (count_over_time({service_name="claude-code", host_name=~"$host_name"} |= "claude_code.tool_result" | json | session_id=~"$session_id" | success="true" [$__interval]))) / (sum by (tool_name) (count_over_time({service_name="claude-code", host_name=~"$host_name"} |= "claude_code.tool_result" | session_id=~"$session_id" [$__interval])))

100 * sum((max_over_time(claude_code_code_edit_tool_decision_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id", decision="accept"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_code_edit_tool_decision_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id", decision="accept"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"})) / clamp_min(sum((max_over_time(claude_code_code_edit_tool_decision_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_code_edit_tool_decision_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"})), 1)

panels.title: Edit/Write Accept Rate
panels.description: Accepted edit/write decisions over total (windowed delta). Denominator clamped to >=1 to avoid divide-by-zero.

targets.expr: sum by (tool_name, decision) (count_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="tool_decision" | session_id=~"$session_id" [$__range]))
sum by (tool_name, error_type) (count_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="tool_result" | session_id=~"$session_id" | success="false" [$__range]))

panels.title: Tool Failures by Error Type
panels.description: Failed tool_result events grouped by tool and error_type over range.

targets.expr: avg by (model) (avg_over_time({service_name="claude-code", host_name=~"$host_name"} |= "claude_code.api_request" | session_id=~"$session_id" | unwrap duration_ms [$__interval]))
sum by (status_code) (rate({service_name="claude-code", host_name=~"$host_name"} |= "claude_code.api_error" | json | session_id=~"$session_id" | __error__ = "" [$__interval]))
quantile_over_time(0.50, {service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="api_request" | session_id=~"$session_id" | unwrap duration_ms [$__interval]) by (model)
quantile_over_time(0.95, {service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="api_request" | session_id=~"$session_id" | unwrap duration_ms [$__interval]) by (model)
quantile_over_time(0.99, {service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="api_request" | session_id=~"$session_id" | unwrap duration_ms [$__interval]) by (model)
sum by (status_code) (count_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="api_error" | session_id=~"$session_id" [$__range]))

sum by (type) (rate(claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__rate_interval]) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}) * 60)

sum(increase(claude_code_commit_count_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__rate_interval]) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"})) or vector(0)

sum(increase(claude_code_pull_request_count_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__rate_interval]) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"})) or vector(0)

{service_name="claude-code", host_name=~"$host_name"} |= "claude_code.tool_result" | session_id=~"$session_id" | line_format "{{.event_timestamp}} [{{.tool_name}}] {{if eq .success \"true\"}}✅{{else}}❌{{end}} {{.duration_ms}}ms {{if .error}}ERROR: {{.error}}{{end}}"

{service_name="claude-code", host_name=~"$host_name"} |= "claude_code.api_error" | session_id=~"$session_id" | line_format "{{.event_timestamp}} [{{.model}}] ❌ HTTP {{.status_code}} {{.duration_ms}}ms ERROR: {{.error}}"

sum by (type) ((max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}))

panels.title: Token Distribution by Type
panels.description: Total tokens per type over range (windowed delta, host-joined).

targets.expr: 100 * sum((max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id", type="cacheRead"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id", type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"})) / sum((max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id", type=~"cacheRead|cacheCreation|input"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id", type=~"cacheRead|cacheCreation|input"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}))

sum by (model) ((max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}))

panels.title: Token Usage by Model
panels.description: Total tokens per model over range (windowed delta).

targets.expr: sum by (query_source) ((max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}))

panels.title: Cost by Query Source
panels.description: Cost per query_source over range (windowed delta, host-joined).

targets.expr: sum by (agent_name) ((max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}))

panels.title: Cost by Subagent
panels.description: Cost per subagent (agent_name). Empty agent_name = main-thread / unattributed.

targets.expr: sum by (skill_name) ((max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}))

panels.title: Cost by Skill
panels.description: Cost per skill. Empty skill_name = non-skill / main-thread work.

targets.expr: sum by (skill_name) ((max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}))

panels.title: Token Usage by Skill
panels.description: Tokens per skill. Empty skill_name = non-skill / main-thread work.

targets.expr: sum by (mcp_server_name) ((max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}))

panels.title: Cost by MCP Server
panels.description: Cost per MCP server. Empty mcp_server_name = no MCP attribution.

targets.expr: sum by (skill_name, invocation_trigger) (count_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="skill_activated" | session_id=~"$session_id" [$__interval]))
avg_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="subagent_completed" | session_id=~"$session_id" | unwrap duration_ms [$__interval]) by (agent_type)
sum by (agent_type) (sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="subagent_completed" | session_id=~"$session_id" | unwrap total_tokens [$__range]))

panels.title: Subagent Token Usage
panels.description: Total tokens per subagent type over range.

targets.expr: sum by (type) ((max_over_time(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total{job=~".*/claude-code", session_id=~"$session_id"}[$__range])) * on (job) group_left() max by (job) (target_info{host_name=~"$host_name"}))

panels.title: Active Time (cli vs user)
panels.description: Active time per type (cli vs user) over range (windowed delta).

title: Claude Code Observability
